summary: Completed testing of Bookvia User Notification Bell feature. All backend API tests (8/8) passed. Frontend notification bell UI working correctly for regular users. Business dashboard notification bell also working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns count for regular user - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list for regular user - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count works for business user - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list for business user - PASSED
Backend: Business has notifications from booking flows - PASSED
Frontend: Navbar notification bell (data-testid='nav-notification-bell') appears for regular user - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking Navbar bell opens notification panel (data-testid='nav-notification-panel') - PASSED
Frontend: Panel shows 'Sin notificaciones' when empty - PASSED
Frontend: Panel closes on outside click - PASSED
Frontend: Navbar notification bell does NOT appear for business user - PASSED
Frontend: Business dashboard notification bell (data-testid='notification-bell') works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Business notification panel shows notifications with correct structure - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx correctly implements notification bell visibility logic: only shows for authenticated non-business, non-admin users (lines 258-322)
Notification panel uses proper data-testid attributes for testing: nav-notification-bell, nav-notification-panel, nav-unread-count, nav-mark-all-read, nav-notif-item-{id}
Outside click handler correctly implemented using mousedown event listener (lines 91-100)
Unread count polling every 30 seconds via setInterval (lines 81-87)
BusinessDashboardPage.jsx has separate notification bell (data-testid='notification-bell') that works independently
Backend notification endpoints properly filter by user_id ensuring users only see their own notifications
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing user 'cliente@bookvia.com' and business 'Test Real Stripe'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User notification bell feature fully tested. Key points: (1) Navbar bell uses data-testid='nav-notification-bell' and panel uses data-testid='nav-notification-panel'. (2) Bell only appears for authenticated regular users (not business/admin). (3) Business dashboard has separate bell with data-testid='notification-bell'. (4) Backend notification APIs work for both user types. (5) Regular user 'cliente@bookvia.com' currently has 0 notifications. (6) Business 'Test Real Stripe' has multiple notifications from booking flows.

mocked_apis_list: Resend email sending (MOCKED in development mode - emails stored in sent_emails DB collection instead of being sent)

navbar_bell_visibility.regular_user: VISIBLE - Bell appears in Navbar header
navbar_bell_visibility.business_user: NOT VISIBLE - Business uses dashboard bell instead
navbar_bell_visibility.admin_user: NOT VISIBLE - Admin has separate panel
